0.text: Centrilobular emphysema more pronounced in the upper lobes of both lungs

1.text: Diffuse thickening of the interlobular septa in both lungs

2.text: Multiple nodules in the left lung, 4 mm in diameter, extending towards interseptal areas in the anterior segment of the upper lobe

3.text: Nodule in the left lung, 5 mm in diameter, with a pleural base in the superior lingular segment of the upper lobe

4.text: Linear densities forming fibrotic bands in both lungs

5.text: Persistent, irregularly circumscribed nodule in the superior segment of the left lower lobe

6.text: Diffuse emphysematous changes in both lungs

7.text: Fibrotic band formations in both lungs

8.text: Nodular densities consistent with scarring in both lungs
